---
title: "Talks"
lang: en
---

A selection of talks, conference presentations, and workshops I have given on data science, Bayesian methods, and open data analytics.

Slides are available as HTML (interactive) or PDF (printable). Where applicable, code repositories and recordings are linked.

If you are organising a conference, seminar, or in-house workshop and would like me to speak on Bayesian modelling, open data analytics, or uncertainty quantification in decision-making, please get in touch: **kristian.vepsalainen@proton.me**

---

## 2026

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
### One Hundredth of a Second

**Event:** useR! 2026
**Location:** TBA
**Date:** July 2026

A Bayesian forward simulation of aerodynamic drag at the 1980 Olympic men's 15 km cross-country skiing race. The talk uses the famous one-hundredth-of-a-second margin between Thomas Wassberg and Juha Mieto as a vehicle for a broader point: when inference is impossible but the physics is known, forward simulation with R turns counterfactual questions into distributions.

[View slides (HTML)](/talks/2026-07-user-mieto-wassberg/mieto-wassberg-useR2026.html){target="_blank"} · [Download PDF](/talks/2026-07-user-mieto-wassberg/mieto-wassberg-useR2026.pdf) · [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/KristianVepsalainen/KristianVepsalainen.github.io/tree/main/talks/2026-07-user-mieto-wassberg)
:::

---

## 2019

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
### Assessing the Quality of Finnish Primary Health Care Registers

**Event:** 9th Nordic Conference of Epidemiology and Register-Based Health Research
**Location:** Tampere University, Finland
**Date:** 2019

Conference presentation on the quality and limitations of Finnish primary health care registers, based on work conducted at the Finnish Institute for Health and Welfare (THL).
:::

---

*This page will be updated as new talks are scheduled. To invite me to speak, please contact kristian.vepsalainen@proton.me.*
